messages: {"parts":[{"tool_name":"edit_file_llm","args":"{\"target_file\": \"/home/workspace/Skills/pulse/scripts/pulse.py\", \"instructions\": \"In the run_filter function, fix the f-string template issue. The JSON example has curly braces that conflict with f-string interpolation. Use the same pattern we used for spawn_drop - move the JSON template to a separate string variable that gets inserted.\", \"code_edit\": \"async def run_filter(slug: str, drop_id: str, brief: str, deposit: dict) -> dict:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"Run LLM Filter to validate a Deposit against its brief\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    token = os.environ.get(\\\"ZO_CLIENT_IDENTITY_TOKEN\\\")\\n    if not token:\\n        # Fallback: auto-pass\\n        return {\\\"drop_id\\\": drop_id, \\\"verdict\\\": \\\"PASS\\\", \\\"reason\\\": \\\"Filter skipped (no token)\\\"}\\n    \\n    # Build JSON template separately to avoid f-string conflicts\\n    json_template = \\\"\\\"\\\"{\\n  \\\"drop_id\\\": \\\"DROP_ID_HERE\\\",\\n  \\\"verdict\\\": \\\"PASS or FAIL\\\",\\n  \\\"reason\\\": \\\"Brief explanation\\\",\\n  \\\"artifacts_verified\\\": true or false,\\n  \\\"concerns\\\": [\\\"any concerns for orchestrator\\\"]\\n}\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    \\n    prompt = f\\\"\\\"\\\"You are a Pulse Filter validating a Drop's work.\\n\\n## Drop Brief (what was requested):\\n{brief}\\n\\n## Deposit (what was delivered):\\n{json.dumps(deposit, indent=2)}\\n\\n## Your Task:\\n1. Compare the deposit against the brief's success criteria\\n2. Check if artifacts were actually created (you can read files to verify)\\n3. Determine PASS or FAIL\\n\\nRespond with ONLY this JSON (no other text):\\n{json_template}\\n\\nReplace DROP_ID_HERE with \\\"{drop_id}\\\".\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n\\n    async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01NEhEFEyLuijW9mXMmNN1Up","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":54151,"cache_write_tokens":853,"cache_read_tokens":53297,"output_tokens":500,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":853,"cache_read_input_tokens":53297,"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":500}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-06T20:49:18.357209Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"74e0a70d-398a-4337-bcab-3e5a3a9d805c","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Architect"},"provider_response_id":"msg_01KiYQmtAghisxGHvpNhPSEv","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"713a60cb-a4c5-4f2e-9ca4-b3f8522258a0","metadata":null}
